name: Huminta (Bolivian Style Souffle)
recipeInstructions:
1. Run the cooked quinoa, tofu, and squash through a fine food mill.
2. Lightly blend in the tahini, anise extract, and salt.
3. Heat a small casserole.
4. Add half of the bread crumbs to the casserole and spread them evenly.
5. Pour in the quinoa mixture.
6. Sprinkle the remaining bread crumbs on top.
7. Cover and bake for 1 hour.
8. Serve hot during cold weather or at room temperature during hot weather. Any leftovers may be sliced and pan-fried.
